# libhangul 3finalsun golden v1 kbd=3-91-noshift (do not edit by hand)
## new_ok=1
## singles
T s_21

  flush=U+3132

  flush=(empty)

  flush=U+AC00

## shift_park
T dak_shift_g
  k=0x75 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3137
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B2E4
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B2EE
  k=0x69 p=1 commit=U+B2EE pre=U+3141
  flush=U+3141

  k=0x5B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC0A
  k=0x64 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC0A
  flush=U+AC0A

## shift_replace
T gak_shift

  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x78 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC01
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC12
  flush=U+AC12

  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x73 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC04

  flush=U+AC06

  flush=U+AC19
## shift_then_jong
T ga_sh_x
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC0A
  k=0x78 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC12
  flush=U+AC12

  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC0A
  k=0x61 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC07
  flush=U+AC07
## shift_empty
T empty_shift
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=U+0028 pre=(empty)
  flush=(empty)
T shift_first
  k=0x5B p=1 commit=U+0028 pre=(empty)
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  flush=U+AC00
## cho_double
T kkf
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3132
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AE4C
  flush=U+AE4C
T llf
  k=0x6C p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3148
  k=0x6C p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3149
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C9DC
  flush=U+C9DC
## vowels
T gwa

  k=0x76 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ACE0
  k=0x2F p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ACE0
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ACE0
  flush=U+ACE0

  flush=U+AD34

  flush=U+ADC0
## jong_cluster

  k=0x78 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC01
  k=0x71 p=1 commit=U+AC01 pre=U+3145
  flush=U+3145

  k=0x73 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC04
  k=0x6C p=1 commit=U+AC04 pre=U+3148
  flush=U+3148
## words
T hangul
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x73 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC04
  k=0x68 p=1 commit=U+AC04 pre=U+3134
  k=0x62 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B204
  k=0x77 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B20C
  flush=U+B20C
T digits
  k=0x30 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+314B
  k=0x31 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+110F U+1160 U+11C2
  k=0x32 p=1 commit=U+110F U+1160 U+11C2 pre=U+3146
  k=0x33 p=1 commit=U+3146 pre=U+3142
  k=0x34 p=1 commit=U+3142 pre=U+315B
  k=0x35 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+315B
  k=0x36 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+315B
  k=0x37 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+315B
  k=0x38 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+315B
  k=0x39 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+315B
  flush=U+315B
T symbols
  k=0x21 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3132
  k=0x40 p=1 commit=U+3132 pre=U+313A
  k=0x23 p=1 commit=U+313A pre=U+3148
  k=0x24 p=1 commit=U+3148 pre=U+313F
  k=0x25 p=1 commit=U+313F pre=U+313E
  k=0x5E p=1 commit=U+313E U+003D pre=(empty)
  k=0x26 p=1 commit=U+201C pre=(empty)
  k=0x2A p=1 commit=U+201D pre=(empty)
  k=0x28 p=1 commit=U+0027 pre=(empty)
  k=0x29 p=1 commit=U+007E pre=(empty)
  flush=(empty)
## backspace
T bs_gan
  built pre=U+AC04
  bs r=1 pre=U+AC00
  bs r=1 pre=U+3131
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_shiftgg
  built pre=U+3141
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_gakshift
  built pre=U+AC12
  bs r=1 pre=U+AC01
  bs r=1 pre=U+AC00
  bs r=1 pre=U+3131
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
## reset
T rs_1
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+B098
T rs_2
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+B098
# end
